name: fage-character-generator
description: FAGE Character Generator - Full Stack Application

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && python -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.postinstall: echo Setup complete! Run 'npm run setup:backend' to set up Python backend environment.
